# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Resources:
  Instance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0f4c844b4b4b4b4b4b
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: my-key-pair
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - sg-0f4c844b4b4b4b4b4b
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          sudo yum update -y
          sudo yum install -y git python3 python3-pip
          sudo python3 -m pip install virtualenv
          # Add your application installation and configuration commands here

  Volume1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
      Size: 8

  InstanceVolumeAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref Instance1
      VolumeId: !Ref Volume1
      Device: /dev/sdf

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Value: !Ref Instance1
  VolumeId:
    Value: !Ref Volume1
